Favorites genres: Action, Comedy, Drama, Romance, Fantasy, Adventure

div.div:
A medical mission turns fatal as Dr. Jin’s life slips away. Miraculously, he wakes on a battlefield. Instinct takes over. He tends to patients before realizing that this is the martial arts world of The Reigning Heavenly Demon! He’s reincarnated as a child with mastery of modern medicine and soon his skills draw notice. From the renowned White-scaled Doctor to the infamous Gongson Family, everyone sees his potential. But how much is Dr. Jin willing to sacrifice before risking death again?
(Source: Tapas)
Quan Mín Zhuan Zhì: Yulongshi Shi Zui Ruo Zhiye?

Luke Foster thought he was doomed when he awakened as a Dragon Tamer, the most useless hidden profession in existence. Dragons are so rare and powerful that for eight centuries, no Dragon Tamer has ever succeeded in taming a dragon. But without one, he can't even unlock his basic skills, leaving him powerless in a world ruled by fighters. Then everything changes after Luke activates the Super Treasure Map System. The mysterious system leads him to the ultimate prize: a real dragon egg! And so, this "weak" Dragon Tamer is about to flip the world upside down. (Source: Tappytoon)

div.b: Your fortune: Better not tell you now
